summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WealthOptimizer AU app after authentication removal. All core features working correctly with dummy portfolio data displaying properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Page titles in browser show previous page titles during navigation (React state issue)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads directly without login requirement
Dummy portfolio data displays correctly (John Smith, $1.98M net worth, $2.92M assets, $942k debt)
Asset allocation pie chart renders with all 6 asset classes
Property portfolio shows 2 properties with negative gearing badges
Investment recommendations section displays all 6 personalized suggestions
Monte Carlo projection chart renders with 10-year data visualization
Navigation works between all pages (Tax Analysis, CGT Calculator, SMSF Optimizer, Report Generator, Saved Scenarios)
Report Generator displays 3 demo scenarios and generates reports successfully
Saved Scenarios page shows 3 demo scenarios with working search functionality
Mobile responsiveness works correctly with proper navigation menu
All quick action buttons are clickable and navigate correctly
